\tzpentry{ID4232}{Magnetization Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4232 introduces Magnetization Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \underline{\underline{\chi}}(\omega) := \frac{\partial \vec{M}}{\partial \vec{H}}\Bigg|_{\omega} = \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{(-i\omega\tau)^n}{n!} \underline{\underline{\chi}}^{(n)} \end{equation}
